# /plan

> L1-L4 work breakdown grouped by integration pattern (event-driven / batch / data-migration). L2 maps to pattern category; L3 maps to FR; L4 maps to the per-resource implementation atom.

## Usage

```
/plan [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>]
```

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/integration/features/{f}/spec.md` (`SPEC_APPROVED` APPROVED)
- [templates/plan.template.md](../../templates/plan.template.md)

## Hierarchy

- **L1 Epic** — the integration feature (one per `/plan` run)
- **L2 Feature/Capability** — per pattern category:
  - `event-driven` (Functions + Logic Apps + Service Bus + Event Grid + APIM)
  - `batch` (ADF + SQL staging + bulk Dataverse)
  - `data-migration` (cutover scripts + reconciliation)
  - `iac` (Bicep modules; cross-cutting)
  - `observability` (AI / Log Analytics; cross-cutting)
- **L3 User Story** — one per FR-NN
- **L4 Task** — implementation atom (3-8h) per resource (Function / pipeline / topic / proc / module)

## Execution flow

1. Generate L1 from spec §1.
2. Generate L2 by walking pattern selection from spec §5.
3. Generate L3 per FR.
4. Generate L4 placeholders per resource derived from spec §3 ACs + customisation inventory.
5. Render `plan.template.md` with `<TBD>` markers for unresolved details.
6. `currentStates += PLAN_DRAFT`; `gate PLAN_CLARIFIED.status=PENDING`.

## Output

- `projects/{p}/integration/features/{f}/plan.md`
